announcement.label: New
announcement.message: A new creative loop is taking shape.

metadata.title: TaleLabs - Visual AI creative workspace
metadata.description: Create and connect AI media workflows. Keep every image, video, and audio result ready to reuse.

hero.title: Create without losing the thread.
hero.description: Connect prompts, Assets, and AI models in visual Flows. Every result stays ready for what comes next.
hero.imageAlt: Creative media arranged as a connected visual process

product.title: Your process should outlive the prompt.
product.description: TaleLabs is a visual AI workspace for generating, organizing, and reusing creative media.
product.detail: Keep references visible, shape ideas in Flows, and carry every successful output into the next creative decision.

process.title: From idea to reusable media.
process.description: One direct loop keeps the work understandable and the output useful.

collect.title: Collect
collect.description: Bring image, video, and audio references into one Asset library.

connect.title: Connect
connect.description: Build visual Flows with prompts, references, and model-adaptive generation.

generate.title: Generate
generate.description: Run model-adaptive image, video, and audio generation in place.

continue.title: Continue
continue.description: Keep every successful result as an Asset, ready for the next branch.

workspace.title: See the whole creative system.
workspace.description: Branches stay visible, references stay connected, and outputs do not disappear into a chat history.
workspace.imageAlt: Creator arranging connected visual references across a studio wall

assets.title: Assets that keep working.
assets.description: Uploaded references and generated media share one reusable library, with provenance intact.
assets.imageAlt: Layered image, film, and audio forms arranged as a reusable archive

closing.title: Make the next result a starting point.
closing.description: TaleLabs keeps ideas, media, and iteration in one visual workspace.
